original_narration_script: A cold blue light. It dances across clammy skin. Eyes, empty. They sit, side by side, yet miles apart. Drinks untouched, voices silenced. Only the glow remains. A silent world, consumed. Alone, together, in the digital dark.
formatted_script_for_tts: A cold, blue light... It dances across clammy skin. Eyes... empty. They sit, side by side, yet miles apart. Drinks untouched. Voices silenced. Only the glow remains. A silent world... consumed. Alone... together... in the digital dark.
script_optimization_note: Script optimized from narration script for optimal TTS delivery with proper pauses and emphasis.
